{#- Stellium theme — master layout. Inherits Sphinx's `basic` theme for all the plumbing (CSS/JS includes, metadata, search index) and overrides the visible page shell only. Sphinx context used here: project, release – from conf.py pathto(...) – URL helper (respects subdir builds) toctree(...) – renders the global nav tree (from your toctrees) toc – the current page's local heading tree (right rail) body – the rendered HTML of the current page theme_accent, theme_github_url, ... – options from theme.conf / html_theme_options -#} {%- extends "basic/layout.html" %} {# --- inject fonts + our data-theme bootstrap before anything paints --- #} {%- block extrahead %} {{ super() }} {%- endblock %} {# --- replace the entire visible page (basic puts relbar+sidebar here) --- #} {%- block content %}
{{ project }} {%- if theme_show_version|default(true) and release %} v{{ release }} {%- endif %}
⎇ ⌘K
{%- if theme_github_url %} {# A real GitHub mark. The scaffold used ⎈, which is U+2388 HELM SYMBOL — it renders as a ship's wheel, and in most fonts as a gear. #} {%- endif %} {# Mobile only. The scaffold hid the sidebar below 760px with `display:none` and gave nothing in its place, so a phone had no navigation at all. #}
{# ---------- LEFT: global navigation, generated from your toctree ---------- `titles_only=True` is load-bearing. Without it, Sphinx walks each document's *headings* into the global nav as well as its pages: this sidebar rendered 457 links, 445 of which were in-page anchors (#your-first-chart-2-lines, …). The left rail is the site map; the right rail is the page map. Keep them separate. maxdepth=2 so a section's pages show, but a page's own sections do not. #}
{{ toctree(maxdepth=2, collapse=False, includehidden=True, titles_only=True) }}
{# ---------- CENTER: the page ---------- #}
{%- block document %} {%- if parents %}
{%- for p in parents %}{{ p.title }}/{%- endfor %} {{ title }}
{%- endif %}
{{ body }}
{%- block prevnext %} {%- if prev or next %}
{%- if prev %}← Previous{{ prev.title }}{%- else %}{%- endif %} {%- if next %}Next →{{ next.title }}{%- endif %}
{%- endif %} {%- endblock %} {%- endblock %}
{# ---------- RIGHT: on-this-page, from the current page's headings ---------- #}
{%- if display_toc %}
On this page
{{ toc }} {%- endif %}
{%- endblock %} {# basic renders its own footer inside block content; we suppress the relbars #} {%- block relbar1 %}{% endblock %} {%- block relbar2 %}{% endblock %}
